page.title: Guest profile
page.subtitle: Unified view of this guest across stays, tickets, orders, reviews and credits – owned by your hotel, not the OTA.

stays.title: Stay history
stays.none: Once the guest completes their first stay, you'll see the timeline here.

prefs.title: Preferences & soft signals
prefs.empty: Capture preferences during check-in or in-stay interactions and they'll appear here for future visits.

credits.title: Credits & rewards
credits.noEntries: No individual credit entries recorded yet.
credits.empty: When you start using VAiyu Credits, this guest's rewards will be visible here.

tickets.title: Room requests
tickets.empty: No tickets yet. Housekeeping and service tickets raised by this guest will appear here.

orders.title: Orders
orders.empty: Any in-room dining or service orders tied to this guest will be listed here.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.empty: When the guest shares feedback, their reviews will appear here across stays.

loading: Loading latest data for this guest…

err.loadFailed: Failed to load guest profile; showing demo data.
